title: Integrate OpenAI API in Next.js
summary: Direct OpenAI API integration — chat completions with streaming, embeddings for semantic search, function/tool calling, and token usage tracking.
declaration: I will integrate the OpenAI API directly into this Next.js project. This includes installing the OpenAI SDK, creating a streaming chat API route, a React client component with streaming UI, embeddings for semantic search, and function calling. I will NOT use the Vercel AI SDK wrapper. If you want the AI SDK abstraction layer (multi-provider support), say so before I begin.
